title: Clean Room Lab
tagline: Class-100 cleanroom environment for microfabrication and thin-film processing.

equipment.name: Deionised Water System
equipment.purpose: Ultra-pure water for wafer cleaning and chemical processing

equipment.name: RF Sputtering System
equipment.purpose: Radio-frequency physical vapour deposition of thin films

equipment.name: DC Sputtering System
equipment.purpose: Direct-current sputtering for conductive thin films

equipment.name: Thermal Evaporation System
equipment.purpose: Resistance-heated evaporation of metals and dielectrics

equipment.name: E-Beam Evaporation System
equipment.purpose: Electron-beam evaporation for high-purity thin-film deposition

equipment.name: Spin Coater
equipment.purpose: Uniform photoresist and thin-film coating on substrates

equipment.name: Wet Bench (Chemical Hood)
equipment.purpose: Wet chemical etching, cleaning, and surface preparation

equipment.name: Optical Microscope
equipment.purpose: Inspection of microfabricated structures and defects
